notes: Integrated security framework for Intranet/Internet transactions; VirtualVault + Authorization Server + ICF + ImagineCard
Trusted gateway; B1 class SecureWare; roles-based admin; deployed by Federal banks for Internet banking 1996
Role-and-rules-based authorization; separated identity validation from back-end resources; high-availability replication
HP standard to resolve national export controls on encryption; designed for global enterprise cryptography deployment
Multi-credential smart card for authentication; planned but never achieved widespread adoption
Public-key certificate standard; Praesidium designed to integrate with X.509; now foundational to TLS/HTTPS
Credit card payment protocol; HP Praesidium planned SET integration; eventually abandoned in favor of SSL/TLS
Network management framework; Praesidium security framework modeled on OpenView's success; succeeded by HP Service Manager and later ITSM tools
